commands.review_summary:
The PR hardens shared and plugin Google/Gemini tool declaration construction to materialize schemas, skip unreadable, cyclic, or oversized declarations, preserve reserved property names, and fail closed when forced or pinned tool choice has no valid declaration.

PR surface: Source +195, Tests +449. Total +644 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: Source inspection gives a clear current-main reproduction path: the Google shared, stream, and realtime declaration builders still read tool fields directly and pass raw schema objects through. I did not execute a runtime repro in this read-only review, so the status is source-reproducible rather than locally reproduced.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] This maintainer-owned draft has no narrow automated repair target; the remaining work is maintainer review, policy acceptance for fail-closed forced choices, and final broad proof.

target.title: fix(google): skip unreadable tool schemas
target.body:
## Summary
- harden shared Google/Gemini tool schema projection by materializing schemas before payload construction and skipping unreadable, cyclic, or oversized declarations
- apply the same schema guard to the Google plugin transport and realtime voice declarations without importing core internals
- preserve reserved JSON Schema property names like `__proto__` and fail closed when forced or pinned Google tool choice points at no valid declaration

## Verification
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check src/llm/providers/google-shared.ts src/llm/providers/google-shared.convert.test.ts extensions/google/tool-schema.ts extensions/google/transport-stream.ts extensions/google/transport-stream.test.ts extensions/google/realtime-voice-provider.ts extensions/google/realtime-voice-provider.test.ts`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/llm/providers/google-shared.ts src/llm/providers/google-shared.convert.test.ts extensions/google/tool-schema.ts extensions/google/transport-stream.ts extensions/google/transport-stream.test.ts extensions/google/realtime-voice-provider.ts extensions/google/realtime-voice-provider.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/llm/providers/google-shared.convert.test.ts extensions/google/transport-stream.test.ts extensions/google/realtime-voice-provider.test.ts --reporter=dot --pool=forks --maxWorkers=1 --fileParallelism=false --teardownTimeout=1000` - 16 shared tests and 94 extension/provider tests passed
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` - clean before rebase

Behavior addressed: malformed Google/Gemini tool schemas no longer crash request payload construction when healthy declarations remain available.
Real environment tested: local linked OpenClaw worktree on Node via repo Vitest wrapper after rebasing onto `origin/main`.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: focused format, diff, lint, and Vitest commands listed above.
Evidence after fix: unreadable getters, revoked proxies, cyclic schemas, reserved `__proto__` property names, optional skipped tools, forced tool-choice failures, and realtime declaration filtering are covered by targeted tests.
Observed result after fix: optional malformed tool declarations are skipped while healthy Google declarations survive; forced/pinned choices fail closed instead of silently becoming free-form or unrelated tool calls.
What was not tested: `pnpm check:changed` in Testbox and Crabbox remote proof. Blacksmith Testbox is not authenticated in this environment, and Crabbox sparse-sync is currently blocked by low local disk before it can start.
target.author: vincentkoc
